name: Erick Cruz
bio_paragraphs: Senior Software Engineer focused on high-scale game systems, with experience in C++, C#, Unity3D, multiplayer, LiveOps, and backend across titles with millions of concurrent players. Also builds AI tools to speed up development and code quality analysis.
MSc in Computer Science (UFABC, 2020), previously Tech Lead at Ambra Gaming, currently Senior Game Engineer at Wildlife Studios.
